Background Proficiencies.title: 背景熟練
Background Proficiencies.hint: Your background grants you proficiency in History and Survival. It also grants you proficiency in Calligrapher's Tools.

Background Ability Score Improvement.hint: Your background allows you to increase your Dexterity, Intelligence, and Wisdom scores; increase one of them by 2 and a different one by 1, or increase all three by 1. None of these increases can raise a score above 20.

Archaeologist.description:
Ability Scores: Dexterity, Intelligence, Wisdom

Feat: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.feats24.Item.phbftSkilled0000]{Skilled}

Skill Proficiencies: History and Survival

Tool Proficiency: Cartographer’s Tools

Equipment: Choose A or B: (A) @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbtulCartograph]{Cartographer’s Tools}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbagLanternBull]{Bullseye Lantern}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbagMap00000000]{Map}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbagCaseMaporSc]{Map or Scroll Case}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbagShovel00000]{Shovel}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbagTent0000000]{Tent}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.equipment24.Item.phbagClothesTrav]{Traveler’s Clothes}, [[/award 17GP]]; or (B) [[/award 50GP]]

You’ve made a lifelong study of the lost and fallen cultures of the past, visiting their ruins, deciphering their written records, and examining their surviving masterworks. Perhaps you studied at Morgrave University or a similar institution, supplementing your time in the library with fieldwork amid ancient ruins in remote locations. Some archaeologists plunder the treasures of the past in search of wealth or fame, but most consider it their calling to learn from the past. In any case, the archaeologists of Eberron combine the qualities of learned historians with the grit of treasure hunters.
Archaeologist.name: Archaeologist

Ring of the Ram.name: 公羊戒指
Ring of the Ram.description:
Ring，珍稀（需同調）

This ring has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. While wearing the ring, you can take a Magic action to expend 1 to 3 charges to make a ranged spell attack against one creature you can see within 60 feet of yourself. The ring produces a spectral ram’s head and makes its attack roll with a +7 bonus. On a hit, for each charge you spend, the target takes 2d10 Force damage and is pushed 5 feet away from you.

Alternatively, you can expend 1 to 3 of the ring’s charges as a Magic action to try to break a nonmagical object you can see within 60 feet of yourself that isn’t being worn or carried. The ring makes a Strength check with a +5 bonus for each charge you spend.

Greater Mark of Finding.name: Greater Mark of Finding
Greater Mark of Finding.description:
General Feat (Prerequisite: Level 4+, Mark of Finding Feat)

You gain the following benefits.

Ability Score Increase. Increase one ability score of your choice by 1, to a maximum of 20.

Improved Intuition. When you use the Hunter’s Intuition benefit of your Mark of Finding feat, you can roll 1d6 instead of 1d4.

Improved Finding. When you use the Finder’s Magic benefit of your Mark of Finding to cast Hunter’s Mark without a spell slot, the range of the spell is doubled, and you can modify the spell so that the target can’t benefit from the &Reference[Invisible apply=false] condition for the duration.

Foundry Note

The benefit of your Mark is automatically increased to 1d6.

Comprehension and Telepathy.name: Comprehension and Telepathy
Comprehension and Telepathy.description: Each chosen creature also gains the benefits of the spell for the duration. In addition, for the duration of the spell, you and the chosen creatures can communicate telepathically with each other while within 1 mile of each other.

Comprehend Languages (Greater Mark).name: Comprehend Languages (Greater Mark)
Comprehend Languages (Greater Mark).description: For the duration, you understand the literal meaning of any language that you hear or see signed. You also understand any written language that you see, but you must be touching the surface on which the words are written. It takes about 1 minute to read one page of text. This spell doesn't decode symbols or secret messages.

Spellcasting.name: 施法
Spellcasting.description:
你透過鑽研詩人技藝而學會了施法。有關施法的規則請參見@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.mh3akteBDiLegqFK]{chapter 7} 。以下資訊詳細說明了如何將這些規則與吟遊詩人法術結合使用。吟遊詩人法術即該職業描述後的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.wwia6Wwo4BgE9GSI]{吟遊詩人法術列表}中羅列的法術。

【戲法】你知曉兩個從吟遊詩人法術列表中你所選擇的戲法。推薦選擇@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDancingLig]和@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplViciousMoc] 。

每當你獲得吟遊詩人等級時，你可以將一個戲法替換為另一個吟遊詩人法術列表中你所選擇的戲法。

當你達到吟遊詩人 4 級和 10 級時，你可以從吟遊詩人法術列表中學習一個新的戲法，正如@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbBard000000000.JournalEntryPage.V8pqIWlaL9GhY61t#class-features]{吟遊詩人特性}表中戲法一欄所示。

【法術位】吟遊詩人特性表記錄了你有多少法術位用以施放 1+環階的法術。當你完成長休時，你會重獲所有消耗的法術位。

【準備1環以上的法術】通過該特性施法前，你需要選擇數個可用的1環以上的法術構成準備列表。首先，從吟遊詩人法術列表中選擇四個 1 環法術。推薦選擇@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplCharmPerso]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplColorSpray]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDissonantW]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplHealingWor]。

準備列表上的法術數量將隨著你的吟遊詩人等級而增加，正如吟遊詩人特性表中準備法術一欄所示。每當該數量增加時，從吟遊詩人法術列表中選擇額外的法術來新增到你的準備列表中，直到你準備列表上的法術數量與吟遊詩人特性表中的數量相匹配。你只能準備已經獲得相應環階法術位的法術。例如，作為 3 級吟遊詩人，你的準備法術列表應該包括六個任意組合的1環或2環法術。

若另一個吟遊詩人特性給予你額外的準備法術，這些法術不會計入你在該特性中的準備法術數量，但是這些法術對你而言仍算作吟遊詩人法術。

【更改準備法術】每當你獲得一個吟遊詩人等級時， 你可以將準備列表中的一個法術，替換為另一個你擁有法術位的吟遊詩人法術。

【施法屬性】魅力是你施放吟遊詩人法術的施法屬性。

【師法法器】你可以使用樂器作為吟遊詩人法術的施法法器。
